### Changed
- Fix ABS config to not override AppVersion in Chart.yaml
- Upgrade chart to version [6.0.6](https://github.com/grafana/mimir/blob/main/operations/helm/charts/mimir-distributed/CHANGELOG.md#605)
- Upgrade mimir to [3.1.4](https://github.com/grafana/mimir/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md#314)
